name: arc-1
description: SAP ABAP development for Claude Code: bundles the ARC-1 MCP server (read/write/search/activate/lint/diagnose ABAP via the ADT REST API) with best-practice skills for RAP services, CDS modelling, ABAP Unit tests, clean-core audits, and UI5 modernization. Read-only by default; opt-in write gates.

sap_url.title: SAP System URL
sap_url.description: URL of your SAP system (e.g. http://host:50000 or https://host:44300).

sap_user.title: SAP Username
sap_user.description: Your SAP user ID for authentication.

sap_password.title: SAP Password
sap_password.description: Your SAP password. Stored in the OS keychain, never in settings.json.

sap_language.title: SAP Language
sap_language.description: SAP logon language and master language for created objects.

sap_insecure.title: Skip TLS Verification
sap_insecure.description: Skip TLS certificate verification (only for self-signed dev/test systems).

sap_allow_writes.title: Allow Writes
sap_allow_writes.description: Allow ABAP object mutations (create/update/activate). Keep off for read/search-only usage.
